meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Framer 3.0
products.tagline: With Agents, Branching, Community, and an all-new design
products.summaryZh: 具备智能体、分支剧情、社区功能及全新设计
products.descriptionZh: 智能体将AI带入画布，助你设计、写作、分析并组织网站。我们还推出了分支功能，让团队在上线前探索创意的新方式，并揭晓全新的Framer社区，创作者可在此分享与获利。这些发布共同改变了团队创建、维护和扩展网站的方式。相信你会喜欢。
products.description: Agents bring AI to the canvas to help you design, write, analyze, and organize your sites. We’re also launching Branching, a new way for teams to explore ideas before they go live, and unveiling the new Framer Community, where creators can share and earn. Together, these launches change how teams create, maintain, and scale websites. We think you’ll love it.

products.name: Swytchcode CLI
products.tagline: Give agents reliable access to 2,000+ APIs w/ durable state
products.summaryZh: 为智能体提供对2000多个API的可靠访问，并具备持久化状态支持
products.descriptionZh: 编写智能体逻辑，跳过繁琐的底层代码。为AI智能体提供对2000多个API的可靠访问，支持重试、幂等性、策略执行和持久化状态。
products.description: Write agent logic, and skip the plumbing. Give AI agents reliable access to 2,000+ APIs with retries, idempotency, policy enforcement, and durable state.

products.name: Daemons by Charlie Labs
products.tagline: Keep PRs, issues, CI, and docs moving with AI agents
products.summaryZh: 使用AI代理高效管理PR、议题、CI和文档。
products.descriptionZh: Charlie Labs为工程团队提供始终在线的AI守护进程，在编码代理完成工作后持续推动任务进展。在代码仓库中定义周期性角色后，守护进程即可持续监控PR、议题、CI、文档及Sentry错误。无需等待人工再次触发指令，守护进程会直接在团队现有工作平台（GitHub、Linear、Slack、Sentry）留下可审阅的更新内容。
products.description: Charlie Labs gives engineering teams always-on AI daemons that keep work moving after coding agents create it. Define recurring roles in your repo, then let Daemons monitor PRs, issues, CI, docs, and Sentry errors over time. Instead of waiting for another human prompt, Daemons leave reviewable updates where your team already works: GitHub, Linear, Slack, and Sentry.

products.name: Quartz
products.tagline: AI email client built for focus. Runs locally on your Mac
products.summaryZh: 专注型AI邮件客户端，本地运行于Mac。
products.descriptionZh: Quartz 将 Gmail 转化为专注的收件箱。它按重要性对每封邮件进行排序，并随着时间推移学习对你而言重要的内容。当你回复时，它会以你的口吻起草回复。AI 完全在你的 Mac 上运行，因此你的邮件保持端到端加密，绝不会与 AI 提供商共享。
products.description: Quartz turns Gmail into a focused inbox. It sorts every message by importance, and learns what matters to you over time. When you reply, it drafts in your own voice. And the AI runs entirely on your own Mac, so your mail stays end-to-end encrypted and never shared with AI providers.

products.name: Android 17
products.tagline: Android becomes an intelligence system
products.summaryZh: Android 成为智能系统
products.descriptionZh: Android 17 带来应用函数、Android MCP、自适应优先的应用要求、应用气泡、继续操作、更强的隐私控制、内存限制、性能改进以及新的媒体/相机 API，标志着 Android 正从操作系统向智能系统转型。
products.description: Android 17 brings AppFunctions, Android MCP, adaptive-first app requirements, App Bubbles, Continue On, stronger privacy controls, memory limits, performance improvements, and new media/camera APIs as Android starts shifting from an operating system into an intelligence system.

products.name: Dopami
products.tagline: Household chores without the mental load for ADHD
products.summaryZh: ADHD人士无需精神负担的家务
products.descriptionZh: Dopami 根据房间、时间、精力和共享家庭环境，建议小型任务，帮助多动症家庭、成人和室友处理家务，减轻心理负担。
products.description: Dopami helps ADHD families, adults, and roommates handle household chores without mental load by suggesting small missions based on room, time, energy, and shared home context.

products.name: Tapfree for Chrome
products.tagline: Voice dictation that adapts to what’s on your screen
products.summaryZh: 根据屏幕内容自适应调整的语音听写
products.descriptionZh: 网页输入方式从未进化。Tapfree改变了这一点。Tapfree是一款面向Chrome文本输入框和ChromeOS的语音优先键盘，让你通过自然说话来撰写消息、笔记、文档和邮件——无需担心听写错误、格式别扭或频繁修正。它理解的是语境，而不仅仅是词语。
products.description: Typing on the web has not evolved. Tapfree fixes that. Tapfree is a voice-first keyboard for Chrome text fields and ChromeOS that lets you write messages, notes, docs, and emails by speaking naturally - without dictation errors, awkward formatting, or constant corrections. It understands context, not just words.

products.name: Deep Work Plan
products.tagline: Models matter. Context matters more. Give your agent a plan.
products.summaryZh: 模型重要，上下文更重要。为你的智能体制定计划。
products.descriptionZh: 深度工作计划将任何代码仓库转化为一个具备最佳工程师上下文的开发框架——让任意AI智能体都能像团队中最聪明的模型那样编码，且不会偏离计划。这不是一个会遗忘的聊天窗口，而是写入仓库的规范：原子化任务、验收标准、验证关卡、可恢复状态。长时运行可承受上下文重置；任何智能体都能从上次中断处继续执行。将智能体指向该计划后即可离开，回来时便能验证已完成的工作。兼容任意智能体与代码仓库，无锁定限制。开源，采用MIT许可协议。
products.description: Deep Work Plan turns any repo into a harness with the context of your best engineer — so any AI agent codes like your smartest model and can't drift from the plan. Not a chat window it forgets, a spec written into the repo: atomic tasks, acceptance criteria, validation gates, resumable state. Long runs survive context resets; any agent picks up where the last left off. Point an agent at it, walk away, come back to work you can verify. Any agent, any repo, no lock-in. Open Source, MIT.

products.name: Dualora
products.tagline: Record in both 16:9 and 9:16 at the same time
products.summaryZh: 同时录制16:9和9:16两种画幅
products.descriptionZh: 跨平台创作者的流程存在断裂：为YouTube横屏录制，翻转手机再为Shorts竖屏录制。或者一次录制后花20分钟裁剪出第二版，效果仍不理想。Dualora在拍摄时解决此问题——而非后期处理。打开应用，拍摄时屏幕实时显示16:9和9:16两种构图——分屏或画中画模式。点击录制，导出两个文件，上传至两个平台。完成。无需猜测，无需重拍，无需桌面端中转，无需注册账户。
products.description: Multi-platform creators have a broken workflow: record landscape for YouTube, flip the phone, record again for Shorts. Or record once and spend 20 minutes cropping a second version that still looks off. Dualora fixes this at capture time — not in post. Open the app and you see both 16:9 and 9:16 framing live on screen while you shoot — Split View or Picture-in-Picture. Hit record. Export two files. Upload to two platforms. Done. No guessing. No re-shooting. No desktop detour. No Account.

products.name: memi
products.tagline: The AI agent harness for product design teams
products.summaryZh: AI智能体工具包，专为产品设计团队打造
products.descriptionZh: 一个macOS工作台，让Claude、Codex和Hermes在你的规格说明、研究资料和Figma文件上运行。
products.description: A macOS workbench where Claude, Codex, and Hermes run on your specs, research, and Figma files.

products.name: Typerino
products.tagline: Screenwriting and playwriting for movies, television, stage.
products.summaryZh: 电影、电视、舞台的剧本与戏剧写作。
products.descriptionZh: 行业标准的电影、电视和舞台剧本格式。无Markdown，无语法：所见即所得。支持Mac和Windows。免费试用14天，之后每月11.99美元，或每年99美元。
products.description: Industry-standard screenwriting and stage-play formatting for feature, television, and stage. No Markdown, no syntax: what you type is what gets exported. Mac and Windows. Free 14-day trial, then $11.99/mo, or $99/year.

products.name: Wolfram Language 15
products.tagline: Computational language built for humans and AI agents
products.summaryZh: 为人类与AI智能体构建的计算语言
products.descriptionZh: Wolfram 语言 15 的新增与更新功能：LLM 与 AI、笔记本与用户界面、符号与数值计算、可视化与图形、几何与图论、天文学、化学、生命科学、知识库、视频、偏微分方程与系统建模、核心语言、编译器与评估、代码库。
products.description: New and updated functionality in Wolfram Language 15: LLM & AI, notebook & user interfaces, symbolic & numeric computations, visualization & graphics, geometry & graphs, astronomy, chemistry, life sciences, knowledgebase, video, PDEs & system modeling, core language, compiler & evaluation, repositories.

products.name: Redactify
products.tagline: Automated profanity censoring for video & audio
products.summaryZh: 视频与音频的自动脏话屏蔽功能
products.descriptionZh: 自动屏蔽视频中的脏话，并模糊说话人的嘴部，确保无一遗漏。专为向TikTok、YouTube、Twitch和Spotify发布内容的创作者、播客主持人和媒体团队打造。
products.description: Bleep out swear words in your videos automatically, and blur speakers' mouths so nothing slips through. Built for creators, podcasters, and media teams shipping to TikTok, YouTube, Twitch and Spotify.

products.name: Tyto by ai-coustics
products.tagline: Audio insight that predicts voice AI performance
products.summaryZh: 预测语音AI性能的音频洞察
products.descriptionZh: Tyto 是一款轻量级模型，运行于您的音频流中，用于预测到达客服的音频是否会导致下游故障。它输出一个综合评分，并分解为六个维度：噪音、说话者混响、说话者音量、干扰语音、背景媒体语音、丢包。在此试用：https://ai-coustics-tyto-demo--ph.modal.run/
products.description: Tyto is a lightweight model that runs on your audio stream and predicts whether the audio reaching your agent will cause downstream failures. It outputs a single score plus a breakdown across six dimensions: noise, speaker reverb, speaker loudness, interfering speech, background media speech, packet loss. Try it here: https://ai-coustics-tyto-demo--ph.modal.run/

products.name: Locus Founder
products.tagline: Text an AI agent and it builds + runs your business
products.summaryZh: 给AI代理发条消息，它就能构建并运营你的业务。
products.descriptionZh: Locus Founder 为您构建并运营一整套业务。大多数AI工具仅能生成落地页，而Locus Founder会与您深度访谈、设计品牌形象，并交付全栈应用。不仅如此，它还能配置Stripe支付系统、对接产品供应链、创建并发布广告，以及完成更多任务。Locus Founder始终在后台运行，仅在需要决策或支出时向您发送确认通知。无需模板、表单或代码。Locus Founder由YCombinator支持。
products.description: Locus Founder builds and runs a whole business for you. Most AI tools only build you a landing page, Locus Founder interviews you, designs the brand, and ships a full-stack app. Locus Founder doesn't stop there; it sets up Stripe payments, sources your product, creates and publishes ads, and so much more. Locus Founder is always working in the background and pings you to approve any decisions or spending. No templates, no forms, no code. Locus Founder is backed by YCombinator.

products.name: ClipDone
products.tagline: Automatic short-form video editing
products.summaryZh: 自动短视频剪辑
products.descriptionZh: 制作视频内容仍然需要大量工作。最好的营销视频通常来自真人对着镜头说话，但手动剪辑既慢又贵。生成AI视频不应该比剪辑真实视频更容易。这就是我们打造ClipDone的原因。它能自动将原始素材转化为可直接发布的短视频。只需上传素材，ClipDone就会完成剪辑、添加字幕、补充画面和动画。
products.description: Creating video content still takes too much work. The best marketing videos usually come from real people speaking to a camera, but manual editing is slow and expensive. It shouldn’t be easier to generate AI videos than to edit real ones. That’s why we built ClipDone. It automatically turns your raw footage into ready-to-post shorts. Just upload your footage and ClipDone edits it together, adds subtitles, b-roll, and animations.

products.name: MCP 2000
products.tagline: AI Drum Machine MPC in your browser
products.summaryZh: 浏览器中的AI鼓机MPC
products.descriptionZh: MCP2000 是一款运行于浏览器中的 AI 驱动 MPC。输入你想要的音色（如“带有脆响军鼓的复古 boom bap 套件”、“120 BPM 的 8 小节非洲浩室沙锤循环”），它便会生成采样，将其放置于 4x4 打击垫网格上，供你进行指法鼓击、切片、编排及添加效果。无需翻找唱片、无需插件、无需安装。只需输入指令、演奏，即可构建节拍。
products.description: MCP2000 is an AI-powered MPC that lives in your browser. Type what you want to hear ("dusty boom bap kit with crunchy snares," "8-bar afro-house shaker loop at 120 BPM") and it generates the samples, drops them onto a 4x4 pad grid, and lets you finger-drum, chop, sequence, and add effects. No crate-digging, no plugins, no install. Just prompt, play, and build a beat.

products.name: Mirlo
products.tagline: Social media for real connections. No likes, no algorithm.
products.summaryZh: 真实社交连接。无点赞，无算法。
products.descriptionZh: Mirlo是一款面向欧洲的社交应用，旨在建立真实的人际连接。它摒弃了互动钩子：没有点赞、没有公开评论、没有算法、没有无限滚动。仅限双向连接，对话仅保留在参与者之间。服务器托管于欧盟，无广告，不出售数据。仅限订阅制，提供14天试用。已在30个欧盟国家的iOS平台上线，并计划进一步推广。专为那些默默关闭了不再适合自己的应用的人而设计。
products.description: Mirlo is a European social app for real human connection. Built without engagement hooks: no likes, no public comments, no algorithm, no infinite scroll. Mutual connections only, so the conversation stays between the people in it. Hosted in the EU, no ads, no data sold. Subscription-only, 14-day trial. On iOS across 30 EU countries with wider rollout planned. Made for the people who quietly closed the apps that stopped working for them.

products.name: Snapchat SPECS
products.tagline: Powerful computer built into lightweight see-through glasses
products.summaryZh: 轻量透明眼镜中内置的强大计算机
products.descriptionZh: SPECS 将计算融入你周围的世界，让你在学习、工作和娱乐的同时，依然能专注于当下。
products.description: SPECS bring computing into the world around you, so you can learn, work, and play while staying present in the moment.

products.name: Cilantro
products.tagline: Watches your accounts and tells you what changed
products.summaryZh: 监控你的账户，并告知你发生了什么变化。
products.descriptionZh: 一次关联银行账户，Cilantro 便会持续监控——异常扣款、账单上涨、自动识别的行程摘要，以及每周“变化一览”。无需预算，无需标签。可独立使用，与伴侣共享效果更佳。只读权限，无广告，不出售数据。
products.description: Connect your bank accounts once and Cilantro does the watching - odd charges, bill creep, auto-detected trip recaps, and a weekly "here's what changed." No budgets, no tagging. Works solo, better with a partner. Read-only, no ads, no data sales.
